input.subject: Cannot connect to VPN
input.body: Several teammates cannot connect to VPN since 09:00 today. The auth dialog says 'authentication failed'. I tried restarting the client and switching to a mobile hotspot — neither helped. I tested from [REDACTED:hostname:44444444].
